title: Chaenostoma paniculatum
taxonomy: Chaenostoma paniculatum is classified within the family Scrophulariaceae, which includes plants commonly known as figworts. This family is further grouped into the order Lamiales, a diverse group of flowering plants. The order Lamiales is part of the clade asterids, which is one of the two main groups of flowering plants. The class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledons, encompasses the asterids, including the Lamiales order. Chaenostoma paniculatum's classification at the kingdom level places it within the kingdom Plantae, which includes all plants.
